resources.title: Basics of Stock Market
resources.description: Learn what a share actually is and how the global stock exchanges facilitate the buying and selling of ownership.

resources.title: Understanding Dividends
resources.description: Discover how companies share their profits with investors and how to build a passive income stream through stocks.

resources.title: Reading a Balance Sheet
resources.description: Assets, liabilities, and equity explained. Learn to judge the financial health of any company before you invest.

resources.title: Introduction to Candles
resources.description: Unlock the visual language of price action. Understand what each candlestick pattern will tell you about market sentiment.

resources.title: The 2% Risk Rule
resources.description: Protect your capital. Learn the fundamental rule of professional risk management to ensure you stay in the game.

resources.title: Psychology of Trading
resources.description: Master your emotions. Learn how fear and greed impact decision-making and how to stay disciplined.

resources.title: Technical Indicators Deep Dive
resources.description: Master RSI, MACD, and Bollinger Bands. Learn how to combine indicators for powerful trading signals.

resources.title: Portfolio Diversification
resources.description: Don't put all your eggs in one basket. Learn how to build a balanced portfolio across sectors and assets.

resources.title: Value Investing Fundamentals
resources.description: Warren Buffett's approach explained. Learn to identify undervalued stocks with strong long-term potential.
